calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-24-2025 Dismissal - No Appearance

Motion For Terminating Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Yaelle E. Gurel In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL WHITE's Motion For Terminating Sanctions.

Defendant Michael White's unopposed Motion For Terminating Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR.

Moving Defendant neither timely filed nor timely served his moving papers. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b) [motion must be filed and served 16 court days before hearing]; Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(a) [service by mail where place of address and place of mailing is within State of California adds five calendar days to "any period of notice"].) see also Code of Civil Procedure section 1010.6(a)(3)(B) [service by email adds two court days to "any period of notice"].) Moving Defendant filed and served his papers on 10/23/2025, which is not 16 court days plus five calendar days before 11/14/2025, the hearing date noticed.

Moving Defendant must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving defendant failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Discovery Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Inspection (Sets One); Request For Monetary Sanctions, Memorandum Of Points & Authorities In Support Thereof; And Declaration Of Yaelle E. Gurel In
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL WHITE'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Discovery Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Inspection (Sets One); Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant's Motion to Compel Discovery Responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand for Inspection (Set One) and Request for Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED.

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Discovery Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Inspection (Sets One)
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL WHITE's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Discovery Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Inspection (Sets One).

Off calendar as untimely. CCP 1005(b).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 9:14am
Appearances (by Zoom):
Jose Alfonso Ramirez-Gomez, Esq. (310) 312-3300 Jacoby & Meyers Attorneys LLP for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. There is no Appearance by Ms. Batte in Open court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Jacoby & Meyers Attorneys LLP, Jose Alfonso Ramirez-Gomez, Esq.'s Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Yolanda Batte.

Granted. Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
